login.title: Sign in to your panel
login.forgotDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password (valid for 10 minutes).
login.emailSentText: If that email is registered, you'll receive a link shortly.
login.emailProblemDetail: The link was generated but we couldn't send it. Check the server mail configuration.
login.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Wait a few minutes.
login.sendError: Error sending email. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noCommentsOnPost: No comments on this post yet.
dashboard.readingTimeHint: Optional — shown in the post (e.g. "5 min")
dashboard.deletePostDescription: This action cannot be undone. The post and all its comments will be permanently deleted.
dashboard.deleteCommentDescription: This comment will be permanently deleted.
dashboard.excerptPlaceholder: Short description shown in post list
dashboard.featuredImageHint: optional — shown as thumbnail in post list
dashboard.uploadFeaturedImage: Click to upload a featured image
dashboard.mapEmbedUrlHint: In Google Maps: Share → Embed a map → copy the src URL from the iframe code.

notifyDialog.title: Notify subscribers?
notifyDialog.description: Send an email notification to {{count}} active subscriber(s) with a link to this post.

comments.title: Comments
comments.deleteDescription: This comment will be permanently deleted.
comments.emptySpamDescription: All spam comments will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: General configuration for your blog and dashboard.

general.title: General
general.subtitle: Blog identity and logo
general.descriptionPlaceholder: A short description of your blog
general.logoInfo: Shown in the blog header and browser tab. Use a square PNG or WebP for best results.

theme.title: Admin theme
theme.subtitle: Visual style of the dashboard (does not affect the public blog)

updates.title: Updates
updates.subtitle: Check for new versions of Corexpress
updates.alreadyLatest: You are running the latest version.
updates.applyingHint: This may take up to 30 seconds. Do not close this page.
updates.applyFailed: Update failed. Please try again or update via SSH.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Change your account password
security.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

google.title: Google OAuth — Subscribers
google.subtitle: Allow blog visitors to subscribe using their Google account.
google.hint: Create credentials at Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials. Leave blank to disable subscriber login.

subscribers.title: Subscribers
subscribers.subtitle: Allow visitors to subscribe and receive email notifications for new posts.
subscribers.disabledHint: Subscriber features are disabled. The subscribe button will not appear on the blog.
subscribers.missingCredentials: Enter your Google Client ID and Secret before enabling subscribers.
subscribers.bothRequired: You must enter both the Client ID and Client Secret.
subscribers.resetDescription: The saved credentials will be permanently deleted. You will need to enter new ones to reactivate subscribers.

googleInfo.title: Google OAuth 2.0 required
googleInfo.description: You need to register your app in Google Cloud Console to get the credentials.
googleInfo.step1: Go to console.cloud.google.com and create or select a project
googleInfo.step2: Enable the Google Identity API in your project
googleInfo.step3: Go to Credentials → Create → OAuth 2.0 Client ID
googleInfo.step5: Copy the Client ID and Client Secret into the fields below

recaptcha.subtitle: Protect the comment form against spam and bots with reCAPTCHA v3.
recaptcha.disabledHint: reCAPTCHA is disabled. Comments can be submitted without verification.
recaptcha.missingKeys: Enter your reCAPTCHA Site Key and Secret Key before enabling.
recaptcha.hint: Get your keys at Google reCAPTCHA Admin. Leave blank to keep disabled.
recaptcha.bothRequired: You must enter both the Site Key and Secret Key.
recaptcha.resetDescription: The saved keys will be permanently deleted. You will need to enter new ones to reactivate reCAPTCHA.

googleInfo.title: Google reCAPTCHA v3 required
googleInfo.description: Register your site at Google reCAPTCHA Admin to get your keys.
googleInfo.step2: Register a new site and select reCAPTCHA v3 as the type
googleInfo.step3: Add your domain to the allowed domains list
googleInfo.step4: Copy the Site Key and Secret Key into the fields below

subscribers.title: Subscribers
subscribers.featureDisabled: Subscriptions are disabled. The subscribe button will not appear on the blog.
subscribers.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove the subscriber from the list. They will no longer receive notifications.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Manage uploaded system images and review where they are being used.
resources.searchPlaceholder: Search by post, name, slug, tag...
resources.emptyHint: When users upload images, they will appear here with usage details and actions.
resources.deleteDescriptionUsed: This resource is currently used in {{count}} place(s). Deleting it will affect those views.
resources.deleteDescriptionUnused: This resource will be permanently removed from the server.

setup.title: Set up your blog
setup.subtitle: Configure which sections appear on your homepage and fill in the details.
setup.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
setup.csrfError: Could not verify session security. Reload the page.
setup.socialRequired: At least one social link is required.

logo.title: Blog Logo
logo.subtitle: Shown at the top of your blog and used as favicon.
logo.label: Logo image
logo.formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP — max 10 MB

postList.title: Post List
postList.subtitle: Your blog posts will always be displayed.

hero.title: Hero Banner
hero.subtitle: A large banner image with text overlay.
hero.uploadBanner: Click to upload a banner image

profile.title: Profile / About
profile.subtitle: Show your profile information on the blog.
profile.uploadImage: Click to upload a profile image
profile.name: Name

social.title: Social Links
social.subtitle: Display your social media profiles on the blog.

comments.title: Comments on posts
comments.subtitle: Allow readers to leave comments on your blog posts.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Configure the public blog sections and content.
blog.bannerRequired: Banner text is required when Hero Banner is active.

hero.description: The hero banner is the first thing visitors see at the top of the home page.
hero.cardSubtitle: Show or hide the banner on the home page
hero.bannerOverlayInfo: Overlay text displayed on the banner image.

profile.description: Configure your profile card (shown on home) and the content of each About page section.
profile.cardSubtitle: The profile widget shown on the home page
profile.name: Name
profile.activateHint: Activate the Profile card to edit About page sections

aboutSubsections.noData: Add content to enable this section

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Project or photo carousel shown on /about

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Professional roles, companies, and tech tags

social.title: Social Links
social.subtitle: Social network icons shown at the bottom of /about
social.editHint: To edit the social link URLs, go to the Social Links tab.

download-pdf.title: Download PDF
download-pdf.subtitle: Button to download the About page as a PDF with the active collection style

social.description: Social network links displayed on the blog. Toggle to show or hide the section.
social.cardSubtitle: Show or hide the social links section on the home page

comments.description: Control whether comments appear on individual post pages.
comments.globalSubtitle: Master switch — disabling hides all comment sections
comments.captchaNote: To protect comments from spam bots, configure Google reCAPTCHA in <settingsLink>Settings → Security</settingsLink>.

search.cardSubtitle: Shows a search field that filters posts by title, summary, content, or tags.
search.info: Search filters posts directly on the server. Enable it so visitors can search your blog.

tags.cardSubtitle: Shows the most used tags on the blog to filter posts.

likes.description: Allow readers to like your posts. Likes are counted per IP address, no account required.
likes.cardSubtitle: Show or hide the like button on every post

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.noData: No data yet. Visit your blog to start tracking.

styles.title: Blog Style
styles.subtitle: Select the visual style of the public blog.
styles.info: The style is applied to the blog your readers see at /. The dashboard style is not affected.

descriptions.default: Rounded cards, color images and indigo accent. Modern and friendly design.
descriptions.classic: Editorial layout with fixed sidebar, serif typography, grayscale images, and pink accent.
descriptions.nebula: Dark tech aesthetic with a bento grid layout, glassmorphism cards, and cyan/violet glow accents.
descriptions.zen: Warm minimalist design with a cream palette and terracotta accents. Serif headings, rounded images.
descriptions.sonic: Brutalista musical: dark background, aggressive uppercase typography, fuchsia and cyan accents.
descriptions.atlas: Travel journal: warm stone palette, serif typography, amber accents and desaturated photography.

editor.linkHint: Leave empty to remove the link.

imageUpload.title: Insert image
imageUpload.fileTypes: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP — max 10 MB

about.chipPlaceholder: React, TypeScript… (Enter or comma to add)

testimonials.textPlaceholder: Write what they said about working with you…

comments.none: No comments yet. Be the first!
comments.name: Name
comments.successText: Your comment is pending approval. Thank you!

subscribe.welcomeText: Thanks for subscribing. You'll receive an email when new articles are published.
subscribe.welcomeNote: You can unsubscribe at any time from any notification email.
subscribe.unsubscribedText: You won't receive any more email notifications. You can re-subscribe at any time from the blog.
subscribe.errorText: Something went wrong with Google sign-in. Please try again.
subscribe.deleteConfirmText: Your account will be permanently deleted from {{blogName}}.
subscribe.deletedText: Your account has been deleted. You're always welcome back.

nebula.backToHomeDesc: Go back to explore more articles.

email.subscribedTo: You're receiving this because you subscribed to {{blogName}}.
